text:
1. First, note the time difference: Asia/Tokyo is UTC + 9 and Asia/Riyadh is UTC + 3, so the time difference is 9 - 3 = 6 hours.
2. Then, subtract the time difference from the given time: 18:00 - 6 hours = 12:00.
3. The date remains the same as the time subtraction doesn't cross a day - boundary.
FINAL_ANSWER: 1494 - 11 - 03 12:00
